title: tdoerks/phinder pipeline - params.input schema
description: Schema for the file provided with params.input

sample.errorMessage: Sample name must be provided and cannot contain spaces

fastq_1.errorMessage: Short-read FASTQ R1 must have extension '.fq.gz' or '.fastq.gz' and cannot contain spaces

fastq_2.errorMessage: Short-read FASTQ R2 must have extension '.fq.gz' or '.fastq.gz' and cannot contain spaces

long_fastq.errorMessage: Long-read (ONT) FASTQ must have extension '.fq.gz' or '.fastq.gz' and cannot contain spaces

fasta.errorMessage: Pre-assembled FASTA (assembly mode) must have extension '.fa', '.fna', '.fasta' (optionally .gz)

platform.errorMessage: platform, if set, must be one of: illumina, ont, hybrid
